name: inline_tasks_demo
description: Demonstrates INLINE tasks — JavaScript that runs on the Conductor server with no workers

inputParameters.expression: (function() { var nums = $.numbers; var sum = 0; var min = nums[0]; var max = nums[0]; for (var i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { sum += nums[i]; if (nums[i] < min) min = nums[i]; if (nums[i] > max) max = nums[i]; } var avg = Math.round((sum / nums.length) * 100) / 100; return { sum: sum, average: avg, min: min, max: max, count: nums.length }; })()

(function() { var text = $.text; var upper = text.toUpperCase(); var words = text.split(' '); var wordCount = words.length; var slug = text.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, ''); var reversed = text.split('').reverse().join(''); return { uppercase: upper, wordCount: wordCount, slug: slug, reversed: reversed }; })()

(function() { var avg = $.average; var config = $.config; var tier = 'bronze'; if (avg >= 90) { tier = 'gold'; } else if (avg >= 80) { tier = 'silver'; } var isHighPerformer = avg >= 90; var isEnabled = config && config.enabled === true; return { tier: tier, isHighPerformer: isHighPerformer, isEnabled: isEnabled, averageUsed: avg }; })()

(function() { return { math: { sum: $.sum, average: $.average, min: $.min, max: $.max, count: $.count }, text: { uppercase: $.uppercase, wordCount: $.wordCount, slug: $.slug, reversed: $.reversed }, classification: { tier: $.tier, isHighPerformer: $.isHighPerformer, isEnabled: $.isEnabled }, summary: 'Processed ' + $.count + ' numbers (avg: ' + $.average + ', tier: ' + $.tier + ') and ' + $.wordCount + ' words' }; })()
